hypothesis: <think>Formal Bound Assertion: Let $N$ be the array size and $B$ be the adaptive block size. The expected time complexity is bounded by $\mathcal{O}(\frac{N}{B} \log(\frac{N}{B}))$, with the eBPF overhead strictly bounded to $\mathcal{O}(1)$ per block transition. Space complexity remains $\mathcal{O}(\log N)$ auxiliary space.</think>
